_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your lab's values. Then run: python -m utils.secrets set --termino  (and similar for other secrets).

mail_provider._comment_type: Pick one: 'uni-graz-ews' (Outlook/Exchange Web Services), or 'yahoo-smtp' (Yahoo SMTP with app-password).

sheet_provider._comment_type: Pick one: 'unicloud' (Nextcloud WebDAV at cloud.uni-graz.at) or 'google' (legacy Google Sheets download).

calendar_provider._comment_type: Pick one: 'none' (skip calendar entirely), 'unicloud-caldav' (Nextcloud calendar at cloud.uni-graz.at), or 'uni-graz-ews' (Outlook calendar).
calendar_provider._comment_share: Optional: add 'share_with': ['user1', 'user2'] to auto-share the calendar with VLs.

auto_vpn._comment_enabled: Linux server only. If true, the script auto-spawns openconnect-sso to authenticate (SAML/Keycloak) and openconnect to bring up the VPN tunnel before the daily workflow, tearing it down after. Requires the OS-level setup from docs/SERVER_VPN_SETUP.md (sudoers, xvfb, openconnect-sso, ...). On Windows/macOS leave this disabled and start Cisco Secure Client manually.
